nodes.label: index.html
nodes.summary: Entry point for MÉMOIRE, a narrative 3D game. Boots Three.js scene, shows title/main-menu/volume-select, drives the volume->case game loop and finale endings.

nodes.label: MÉMOIRE
nodes.summary: Narrative game about 'deciding what happened means'. Six volumes of cases with a continuous save carrying choices across volumes.

nodes.label: Volumes I-VI
nodes.summary: Six story volumes (Lighthouse, River, Observatory, Null, Origin, Prime). A volume unlocks when the prior one is finished; Continue resumes at first unfinished.

nodes.label: Endings
nodes.summary: Three finale endings after Vol VI: continuity (one Keeper), distribution (all versions persist), termination (raw memory only).

nodes.label: src/game.js
nodes.summary: Exports playCase, runStandaloneDialogue, playCinematicCase — the case/dialogue runners.

nodes.label: src/ui_three.js
nodes.summary: UI object: 3D Three.js rendering, overlay dialogue, hub, banners, pause.

nodes.label: src/state.js
nodes.summary: State object: persistent save (localStorage memoire_save), flags tracking volume completion and choices.
